ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn how to develop, deploy and iterate on production-grade ML applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/cosmos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cosmos
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/GenAI_Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/GenAI_Agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
50+ tutorials and implementations for Generative AI Agent techniques, from basic conversational bots to complex multi-agent systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Each technique has a detailed notebook tutorial.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: borglab/gtsam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/borglab/gtsam
Language: jupyter-notebook
GTSAM is a library of C++ classes that implement smoothing and mapping (SAM) in robotics and vision, using factor graphs and Bayes networks as the underlying computing paradigm rather than sparse matrices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/happy-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/happy-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
📚 从零开始构建大模型

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/self-llm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/self-llm
Language: jupyter-notebook
《开源大模型食用指南》针对中国宝宝量身打造的基于Linux环境快速微调（全参数/Lora）、部署国内外开源大模型（LLM）/多模态大模型（MLLM）教程

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-deepmind/deepmind-research
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-deepmind/deepmind-research
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository contains implementations and illustrative code to accompany DeepMind publications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hustvl/4DGaussians
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hustvl/4DGaussians
Language: jupyter-notebook
[CVPR 2024] 4D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Dynamic Scene Rendering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 weeks, 26 lessons, 52 quizzes, classic Machine Learning for all

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/iq-series
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/iq-series
Language: jupyter-notebook
The IQ Series is a hands-on learning experience for Microsoft IQ: Microsoft's unified intelligence layer for the enterprise, spanning Foundry IQ, Work IQ, and Fabric IQ. The series includes video episodes, Jupyter notebooks, and Azure deployment templates.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mrdbourke/pytorch-deep-learning
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mrdbourke/pytorch-deep-learning
Language: jupyter-notebook
Materials for the Learn PyTorch for Deep Learning: Zero to Mastery course.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: roboflow/notebooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/notebooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of tutorials on state-of-the-art computer vision models and techniques. Explore everything from foundational architectures like ResNet to cutting-edge models like RF-DETR, YOLO11, SAM 3, and Qwen3-VL.
